zh.Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Englan: 英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可
zh.Brereton, Cheshire, Eng: 英國英格蘭爾布雷雷頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Brereton於大約1295年出生在英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可時，他的父親William of Brereton32歲，母親Rohese de Vernon15歲。他於1318年與Margery Bosley在英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1342年之後在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Englan: 英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可
zh-hans.Brereton, Cheshire, Eng: 英国英格兰爾布雷雷頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Brereton于大约1295年出生在英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可时，他的父亲William of Brereton32岁，母亲Rohese de Vernon15岁。他于1318年与Margery Bosley在英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1342年之后在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Brereton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Brereton, in Cheshire and Staffordshire, and sometimes from Brearton in Yorkshire or Brierton in Durham. Brereton in Staffordshire is named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + Old English dūn ‘hill’ as its final element; the others are named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Brewerton
meanings: English: variant of   Brereton  , the result of confusion by folk etymology with the occupational name   Brewer  .

variants.name: Brierton
meanings: English: habitational name from Brierton in County Durham (formerly in Yorkshire) or Brearton in North Yorkshire, which are both named with Old English brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘farmstead’, or Brereton in Cheshire, which has the same origin (see Brereton ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William Brereton was born about 1295, in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, his father, William of Brereton, was 32 and his mother, Rohese de Vernon, was 15. He married Margery Bosley in 1318, in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1342, in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Brereton est né environ 1295, à Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William of Brereton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Vernon, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Margery Bosley en 1318, à Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1342, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Brereton um 1295 in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William of Brereton 32 und seine Mutter Rohese de Vernon 15. Er hat 1318 in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England Margery Bosley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1342 in London, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Brereton è nato il circa 1295 nel Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, William of Brereton, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Rohese de Vernon, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Margery Bosley nel 1318, nel Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1342, nel London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Breretonが約1295年にイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィックで生まれた時，父William of Breretonは32歳，母Rohese de Vernonは15歳であった。1318年にイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィックでMargery Bosleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1342年以後にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Brereton(이)가 대략 1295년 영국 체실르 브레레턴 쿠 스멧h윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William of Brereton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Rohese de Vernon(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1318년 영국 체실르 브레레턴 쿠 스멧h윅에서 Margery Bosley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1342년 이후 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 사망했다.

mn.Brereton, Cheshire, Eng: Brereton, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Brereton nasceu aproximadamente 1295, em Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William of Brereton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Rohese de Vernon, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Bosley em 1318, em Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1342, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Brereton родился около 1295 г. в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William of Brereton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Vernon, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Bosley в 1318 г. в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1342 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

sm.about 1295–after 1342: e tusa o le 1295–ina ua ma'ea le 1342

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Brereton nació aproximadamente 1295, en Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William of Brereton, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Rohese de Vernon, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Margery Bosley en 1318, en Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1342, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
